description: Memorial list of the Gaonic family of Evyatar Ha-Kohen, headed 'principals of schools' but including also names of people that were no Geonim, ca.969-1021. (NB: This dating seems erroneous, as the list includes Maṣliaḥ Gaon, who was in office 1127–39.)
description_he: רשימת יזכור למשפחת הגאון אביתר הכהן, בכותרת 'ראשי ישיבות', כוללת גם שמות שאינם גאונים, בערך 969–1021.
